UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MA, ALEX K AN INDIVIDUAL $10,535.08 PRINCIPAL, $1,400.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,655.97 INTEREST, $430.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,021.05, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CRC 3.740 REVIEW - JUDGMENT ON FILE.
COST BILL, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,279.18 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION (OF ALEX K MA) IS GRANTED. JUDGMENT DEBTOR ALEX K MA PRESENTED AT THE HEARING PROOF THAT HIS SOCIAL SECURITY INCOME IS DEPOSITED IN HIS US BANK ACCOUNT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY C. VAUGHN, CSR # 6185 (302)

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ELIZABETH MACDONALD, TEL. NO. 922-5939, SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ALEX MA, TEL. NO. 831-7346, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption is Granted. Judgment Debtor Alex K Ma presented at the hearing proof that his Social Security income is deposited in his US Bank account. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)
